content: T2DM with glucose >600 mg/dL, severe dehydration, altered consciousness. IV saline 1L/hr first hour, insulin drip after fluids.
Acute pulmonary oedema: IV furosemide 40-80mg, GTN infusion if SBP>100, CPAP or BiPAP for respiratory support. Morphine use is controversial.
